problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: The key to Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? is Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier — specifically Nanoparticle delivery to — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
